prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-DOLLBIKE-PARENT Product Type: TOY_FIGURE_PLAYSET Brand (from catalog): TychoTyke Existing Title: TychoTyke Pretend Play Doll Set With Bike And Sport Equipment (3 Colors) Description: Have sporty playtime fun with this Doll and Bike Set.

This set comes with an 11 inch tall doll, decked out in sports gear. She comes with a multitude of accessories, including a bike for her to ride on, a helmet for safety, and two tennis rackets.

Everything in this set is vibrantly colored and makes for a fantastic holiday or birthday gift for any little one in your life.

3 Bike Colors Available: Yellow, Blue or Purple Search Terms: doll set accessories play for girls gift motorcycle bike sports equipment Features: - RIDE-ON BIKE: Includes a vibrant pink bike for the doll to ride on! | Hours of playtime fun. - ACCESSORIES: Comes with tennis rackets, a helmet, and more! - GREAT GIFT: Makes a fantastic birthday or holiday gift for any young kids! | Ages 3 and up. - CUTE OUTFIT: Doll is dressed in a cute, sporty outfit! | Perfect to take along with on any outdoor adventure. - POSABLE: Features movable arms and legs. | Have hours of imaginative fun! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: TychoTyke Doll with Bike and Sports Accessories Set

tokens.name: Doll with Bike and Sports Accessories Set

openai.item_name: TychoTyke 11 in Doll Set With Bike And Sports Accessories

anthropic.title_differentiation: 11-Inch Doll, Ride-On Bike, Tennis Rackets, Helmet, Posable Arms And Legs, Ages 3 And Up

openai.title_differentiation: Posable 11 Inch Doll, Ride-On Bike, Helmet And Tennis Rackets, Sporty Outfit, Gift For Ages 3 Plus
